consistency.with_standard: Consistent with standard D&D 5e spell structure and mechanics.
consistency.internal: The components (V, S, M) and casting time/range are standard for a 4th-level spell of this nature. The description clearly outlines the effect and limitations.

quality.clarity: High. The effect (asking one question about an event in the next 7 days) and the resulting answer format (phrase, rhyme, omen) are clearly defined.
quality.completeness: Complete. Includes all necessary mechanical and narrative elements.
quality.flavor: Good. The required material component (incense and sacrifice worth 25gp) reinforces the religious and high-stakes nature of contacting a deity.

mechanics.level_appropriateness: Appropriate for a 4th-level slot, given the guaranteed truthful information within a short timeframe (7 days).
mechanics.cost_benefit: Strong benefit for low immediate cost (though the material component cost is significant). The cumulative chance of error on repeated castings is a well-balanced deterrent.
key_mechanics: Risk Factor: Cumulative 25% chance of random reading on subsequent castings before a long rest.

analysis.suggested_actions: None. The data entry is accurate and complete.
